sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33700" key="e(likope/talos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑλῐκο-πέτᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n33700.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with twining leaves</tr_>, prob in Sacerd.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4019.tlg003:p.540:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.540.1</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
